title: More fuel items
description: Adds ability to smelt with lots of new items
body:
**More Fuel Items — Use Everything to Cook!**

More Fuel Items is a lightweight and useful mod that adds fuel properties to many items that should have been burnable in vanilla Minecraft. No more wasting inventory space with useless items — turn them into energy!

**What's new? (Items you can now use as fuel):**

- Wheat: Perfect for a quick snack in the furnace.

- Hay Bales: High-efficiency fuel! Burns for a long time.

- Paper & Books: Great for when you have too much sugar cane.

- Wooden Bowls: Finally, a use for empty bowls!

**Connect with us:**

- Support us on Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/netheritegroup

- Modrinth Profile: https://modrinth.com/user/NetheriteGroup

- CurseForge Projects: https://www.curseforge.com/members/netheritegroup/projects
